antibody_test.note: inference only on committed best_model.pt; pooled across all test antigens

_meta.source: raw sklearn roc_curve / precision_recall_curve output, not resampled or smoothed
_meta.voice_note: voice curves use per-speaker aggregated probabilities (the paper's headline level)
_meta.antibody_note: pooled across all test antigens; inference only on committed best_model.pt
_meta.thinning_rule: curves over 500 points are thinned by taking every n-th point; see per-curve 'thinning'
_meta.gene_note: gene n_pos/n_neg: positive class = older (age > 60); internal 42 older/26 younger (n=68), external 12 older/11 younger (n=23)
